description: Composition Red printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a round neck with slit, three quarter length raglan sleeves with contrast cuffs, three button placket with mother of pearl buttons, embellished panel around neckline with sequins, no vents and printed detail at hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright colour and lovely flower print at the hem will lift your mood while the sequins and sweet mother of pearl buttons keep you looking feminine. Wear this kurta over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up with bright ethnic jewellery. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
